creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sat Apr 26 18:14:51 2014
New Revision: 352342
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352342
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352342/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, remove Author line
  
  PR:		ports/188828
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/textproc/p5-XML-XBEL/Makefile
  head/textproc/p5-XML-XBEL/pkg-descr

Modified: head/textproc/p5-XML-XBEL/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/p5-XML-XBEL/Makefile	Sat Apr 26 18:14:47 2014	(r352341)
+++ head/textproc/p5-XML-XBEL/Makefile	Sat Apr 26 18:14:51 2014	(r352342)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	textproc perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	OOP for reading and writing XBEL documents
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-TimeDate>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-TimeDate \
 		p5-XML-LibXML>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-LibXML
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}

Modified: head/textproc/p5-XML-XBEL/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/p5-XML-XBEL/pkg-descr	Sat Apr 26 18:14:47 2014	(r352341)
+++ head/textproc/p5-XML-XBEL/pkg-descr	Sat Apr 26 18:14:51 2014	(r352342)
@@ -1,5 +1,4 @@
 XML::XBEL provides an object oriented interface for reading and
 writing XBEL files in Perl.
 
-Author: Aaron Straup Cope <ascope@cpan.org>
 WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/XML-XBEL/
